intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but represented only by the white rabbit anchor and soil debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: White rabbit anchor remains; plant matter is absent or non-viable.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of growth.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of growth.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; soil appears undisturbed but devoid of foliage.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of growth.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears consistently dark and potentially desiccated across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White fragments (likely eggshell or perlite) are present in the black pot (P3).

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Initial state shows a small green sprout in the black pot (P3/P4 area).
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Sprout appears to have withered or been removed; white debris remains.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Total loss of visible plant matter; the biome is now effectively a dormant soil-only environment.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has suffered a total collapse. All registered plant specimens are either dead or removed. The environment is currently non-viable for the listed species.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of white granular debris (likely eggshells) in the black pot is the only non-soil element remaining.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete systemic failure of the botanical collection. Starting from the earliest image, a single sprout was visible in the black pot, which subsequently withered. By the current state, all pots are devoid of living plant material. The white rabbit anchor remains as the sole identifier of the P3 location, but the plant itself is absent. The environment is currently in a state of total dormancy or loss.
